project_type: React + Vite single-page application (mind-map / card-based workspace tool)
test_framework: None - no test infrastructure exists in this project
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm no build errors. Manually verify the toggle button appears in the floating action bar and that card editing behavior changes based on the toggle state.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. No test framework exists, validation is through build success.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns in App.jsx.
key_patterns: All application logic is in a single App.jsx file (5876 lines). State is managed with React useState hooks. The floating action bar (FAB) is a vertical column of icon buttons at the bottom-right of the canvas. Card editing is triggered by clicking title/content areas which sets `editingTextNode` state. Card selection/dragging is handled via `onPointerDown` on the card wrapper which sets `draggingNode`. A card click (no drag movement < 5px) sets `focusedNodeId`. The `editingTextNode` state gates rendering of textarea vs static content. Icons come from lucide-react.
directory_structure: src/App.jsx - Main component with all logic (5876 lines), src/MiniMap.jsx - Mini-map component, src/TaskPanel.jsx - Task panel, src/PinPanel.jsx - Pin panel, src/ReminderPanel.jsx - Reminder panel, src/main.jsx - Entry point, src/index.css - Global styles
